title: What does PalmsPlay Rewards do, can you explain it in detail?
description: We are the provider of online entertainment platform and bring to our members a variety of entertainment.

title: How do I play games with my Bonus Gold and GWz Gold coins?
description: Go to https://play.fortune8.online from the lobby, select the switch coin symbol located at the top right- hand side of the user interface. Once selected the gold coin lobby will appear from behind the curtains, and you may select from the promotional games available.

title: What are unqualified coins?
description: Unqualified coins are free bonus gold coins received when you make a silver package purchase from our Shop. Bonus gold coins (unqualified coins) remain unqualified for prize redemption until play-through requirements have been met. Bonus gold coins cannot be purchased.

title: Why can’t I redeem cash back or gift cards?
description:
When requesting redemptions for prizes, our processing team is required to verify your account information, your identity and legitimate gameplay.

To qualify for prize redemption, you must be 18+ years of age and provide 3 valid proofs of identification that match the information you provided in “My Account.” It is your responsibility to ensure that your jurisdiction does not prohibit you from participating in promotional sweepstakes games.

Suspicious activity in your account may also result in the rejection of your redemption request and in such circumstances, a member of our team will contact you for more information and proof of purchase.

title: How long will it take to receive my rewards?
description:
Receiving your rewardz prize can take up to 3 weeks to process. When requesting rewardz prize redemptions, our processing team are required to check your account information, identity and legitimacy of your gameplay.

To check the progress of your prize redemption, go to “My Account” and select your transaction history. Should your prize redemption remain pending for more than 3 weeks then feel free to contact us for an update. When contacting us to ensure a timely response, always provide your name, email address and User ID.
